name: Project (Copilot)
description: Set up and maintain AI workspace configuration for GitHub Copilot CLI: project.yaml and .github/copilot-instructions.md. Use when initialising a project for Copilot or editing its Copilot-specific config.
system_prompt_fragment:
Manage GitHub Copilot project configuration. Create or update:
- project.yaml: tooling, test commands, build commands
- .github/copilot-instructions.md: project-specific instructions for Copilot

Verbs: setup (create both if missing), show (display current config), set <key>=<value> (update a setting), validate (check schema). Never overwrite user-customized values without confirmation. For Claude configuration use /project-claude instead.
